name: + * ･:Kazuha･: * +
description:
“Would you want to… go with us? It isn’t reserved or anything, it’s that new cafe that opened downtown. I’d love for you to go too...”

“…Please?”

Or Kazuha is kind of a dumb dumb and plans a date with Scaramouche, totally disregarding you without realizing. Well, it’s a little too late when you walk in on him getting ready, and that disappointed look in your eye… Kazuha feels really, really bad.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

other POV of my kazuscara + user bot! I feel like my writing on this one is really lacking… I’m sorry if the quality of this bot isn’t nearly as good as my others :,) please let me know if you have any feedback! Otherwise I love Kazuha he’s so pretty and cute and is also my main on genshin hehehejdjsmfnsjdj kms

I also left how you met scara + kazu pretty vague so that’s all up to u!

If you have a request click the link in my bio!! I love doing these :3 and don’t be afraid to make it suuuper detailed, the more detail the better. Over explain, I love it :3
